items.type: Array<{ href?: string; label: string; current?: boolean }>

onNodeDrag.type: (id: string, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void

onNodeResize.type: (id: string, size: { width: number; height: number }) => void

onPreferenceChange.type: (id: string, channel: NotificationChannel, enabled: boolean) => void

attributes.type:
| PageBuilderTextAttributes
    | PageBuilderHeadingAttributes
    | PageBuilderButtonAttributes
    | PageBuilderImageAttributes
    | PageBuilderDividerAttributes
    | PageBuilderContainerAttributes

reactions.type: Array<{id: string, emoji: string, label: string}>

onValueChange.type: (event: CustomEvent<{ value: string | string[] | null }>) => void

options.type: Array<{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }>
